query:
-- 更新所有批次的FOB价格（30-150 USD之间随机）
UPDATE product_variants 
SET sellingPriceFOB = ROUND(30 + (RAND() * 120), 2),
    sellingPriceRMB = ROUND(200 + (RAND() * 800), 2);
